title: Assembly poll 2026: CPI(M) commences post-poll debacle stock-taking exercise in Kerala as it realises there is no magic bullet
description: The debilitating rout, especially in the party’s strongholds, has thrown up some big questions regarding the party’s campaign strategy, organisational cohesiveness, candidate finalisation, and efficacy of its political operations, including whether “misplaced confidence” of an “inevitable” third consecutive term in power had imbued the party’s electioneering with complacency from the booth level and upwards
